cards.about_card.actions.i0.title: ← Back to menu
cards.about_card.body.i1.text: Greentic is a **WASM-component-based, multi-tenant platform** for building and running AI-driven digital workers.
cards.about_card.body.i2.text: It uses WebAssembly (WASI Preview 2) for sandboxed, portable execution — meaning your automation components run safely in any environment without dependencies.
cards.about_card.body.i3.facts.i0.title: Runtime
cards.about_card.body.i3.facts.i1.title: Messaging
cards.about_card.body.i3.facts.i2.title: Events
cards.about_card.body.i3.facts.i3.title: Components
cards.about_card.body.i3.facts.i4.title: Security
cards.about_card.body.i3.facts.i5.title: Version
cards.architecture_card.actions.i0.title: 📖 Architecture Docs
cards.architecture_card.actions.i1.title: ← Back to menu
cards.architecture_card.body.i1.text: Greentic uses a layered architecture where everything runs as sandboxed WebAssembly components:
cards.architecture_card.body.i2.items.i0:
```
User Message
    │
    ▼
┌─────────────────────┐
│   Provider Pack     │  Slack, Teams, WebChat...
│   (WASM Component)  │  Ingress → Normalize
└─────────────────────┘
    │
    ▼
┌─────────────────────┐
│   Flow Engine       │  .ygtc flow DAG
│   (Runner Host)     │  Steps → Components
└─────────────────────┘
    │
    ▼
┌─────────────────────┐
│   Component Pack    │  Cards, Templates,
│   (WASM Components) │  LLM, Scripts, MCP
└─────────────────────┘
    │
    ▼
   Response
```
cards.capabilities_card.actions.i0.title: 📚 Browse Components
cards.capabilities_card.actions.i1.title: ← Back to menu
cards.capabilities_card.body.i1.text: Greentic digital workers can automate conversations and tasks across multiple channels:
cards.capabilities_card.body.i2.items.i1: Slack, Microsoft Teams, Telegram, WhatsApp, Webex, WebChat, Email — one flow, all channels.
cards.capabilities_card.body.i2.items.i3: Interactive forms, buttons, images, and data displays that work across platforms.
cards.capabilities_card.body.i2.items.i5: Webhooks, timers, email triggers, SMS — react to events from any source.
cards.capabilities_card.body.i2.items.i7: Connect to GitHub, Google, Microsoft APIs securely. Use MCP tools for AI-powered actions.
cards.capabilities_card.body.i2.items.i9: Built-in i18n (50+ languages), per-tenant isolation, custom branding per team.
cards.getting_started_card.body.i1.text: Get up and running with Greentic in 4 simple steps:
cards.getting_started_card.body.i2.items: `gtc wizard` — interactive setup for your first digital worker
`gtc setup ./my-bundle` — connect Slack, Teams, or WebChat
`gtc start ./my-bundle` — your digital worker is live
cards.welcome_card.body.i0.items.i0.colu: I'm your AI assistant powered by Greentic. I can help you learn about the platform, guide you through setup, or answer your questions.
cards.welcome_card.body.i1.text: What would you like to explore?
